description: Subcomponent for `v-sparkline` that renders the tooltip displayed when hovering over data points.

props.index: Index of the active data point. Pass `null` to hide the tooltip content.
props.value: Value of the active data point. Forwarded to **title-format** and the default slot.
props.titleFormat: Function used to format the tooltip body when no slot is provided. Receives `{ index, value }`.
props.target: The coordinates used to position the tooltip.
props.offset: Distance in pixels between the tooltip and the target point.

slots.default: Custom content for the tooltip. Receives `{ index: number, value: number }`.
